2606.25195.title: SoK: AI Secure Code Generation: Progress, Pitfalls, and Paths Forward
2606.25195.paper_summary: The increasing use of AI systems for code generation raises a central security question: what can today's models and coding agents actually do to produce secure code, where do they still fail, and what would move the field forward? Existing work has explored prompting, fine-tuning, reinforcement learning, and agentic workflows for secure code generation, but the field still lacks a systematic understanding of how these techniques improve security and why substantial failures persist. In this SoK, we systematize the progress, pitfalls, and paths forward for AI secure code generation. We introduce a three-level framework that measures models' natural-language understanding of secure coding principles, their code-level actuation of those principles during generation, and the knowledge--actuation gaps between the two. We instantiate this framework across models and coding agents on benchmarks covering both isolated function-level security and full web-application security. Our results show that secure-coding-principle understanding is a statistically strong predictor of code-level outcomes, including functional correctness, security, and joint functional-security correctness. Yet substantial knowledge--actuation gaps remain: models can recognize relevant security principles but still fail to translate them into secure and functional code. These findings offer a principle-centered account of where AI secure code generation stands today and identify concrete paths forward through principle-guided generation, evaluation, benchmarking, and agentic workflows.
2606.25195.paper_summary_zh: 隨著AI系統在代碼生成中的使用日益增加，提出了一個核心安全問題：當今的模型和編碼代理實際上能做什麼來生成安全代碼，它們在哪些方面仍然失敗，以及什麼能推動該領域向前發展？現有的研究已經探討了提示、微調、強化學習和代理工作流程在安全代碼生成中的應用，但該領域仍然缺乏對這些技術如何改善安全性及為何存在重大失敗的系統性理解。在這篇SoK中，我們系統化了AI安全代碼生成的進展、陷阱和未來的路徑。我們引入了一個三層框架，測量模型對安全編碼原則的自然語言理解、在生成過程中對這些原則的代碼級實施，以及兩者之間的知識-實施差距。我們在涵蓋孤立函數級安全和完整網絡應用安全的基準上，對模型和編碼代理實現了這一框架。我們的結果顯示，對安全編碼原則的理解是代碼級結果的統計強預測因子，包括功能正確性、安全性以及聯合功能-安全正確性。然而，仍然存在顯著的知識-實施差距：模型可以識別相關的安全原則，但仍然無法將其轉化為安全且功能正常的代碼。這些發現提供了一個以原則為中心的視角，說明了當前AI安全代碼生成的現狀，並通過原則引導的生成、評估、基準測試和代理工作流程確定了具體的前進路徑。
2606.25195.author: Rupam Patir et.al.
2606.25195.authors: Rupam Patir, Keyan Guo, Haipeng Cai, Hongxin Hu
